agentRecommendation.reasoning: 6960x4640 — highest-resolution walking track image on Commons for the Peninsula. Coastal scrub along the Range Area Walk at Point Nepean. Exactly matches the brief's 'track-through-coastal-scrub' requirement. Sep 2025, very fresh. Not claimed by any other slot — zero twinning risk. SA override required.

rejected.note: Cape Schanck walking trail — also candidate for explore-hub-hero-01. Avoid twinning.
Tea Tree Creek — less famous, editorial weight soft-fail.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy.
